overview: A standalone Node.js proxy server that polls the Twelve Data REST API every 2 minutes for forex rates, caches prices and historical OHLC data in memory, and exposes /rates, /history, and /health endpoints. Fully configured for one-click deployment on Render.com.
features: Polls Twelve Data for live forex rates every 2 minutes
Caches latest prices with timestamps in memory
Fetches 200-candle 1H OHLC history for all pairs at startup
/rates endpoint returns all cached pair prices
/history endpoint returns cached OHLC data without additional API calls
/health endpoint returns uptime without triggering any API call
Graceful fallback — serves last cached prices if Twelve Data is unavailable
Configurable forex pairs via FOREX_PAIRS environment variable
Render.com deployment-ready with render.yaml, npm install build, and dynamic PORT support
